title.en: Bellingham reaching heights of World Cup legends with Messi next
title.zh-CN: 贝灵厄姆与梅西一起攀登世界杯传奇高峰

summary.en: Jude Bellingham again dazzles England and the World Cup with his brilliance, matching some records of the all-time greats.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）再次以他的辉煌让英格兰和世界杯眼花缭乱，与一些历史上伟大的纪录相匹配。

title.en: Tuchel angry at 'lucky' and 'sloppy' England - can 'mentality' be enough?
title.zh-CN: Tuchel对“幸运”和“草率”的英格兰感到愤怒- “心态”是否足够？

summary.en: England head coach Thomas Tuchel is praised by former England players for saying his players "got lucky" in World Cup quarter-final win over Norway - but match-winner Jude Bellingham disagrees.
summary.zh-CN: 英格兰主教练托马斯·图切尔（ Thomas Tuchel ）因在世界杯四分之一决赛中击败挪威而受到前英格兰球员的赞扬，但获胜者裘德·贝林厄姆（ Jude Bellingham ）不同意。

title.en: Embolo sent off as result of mistaken identity rule
title.zh-CN: 由于错误的身份规则而发送的栓塞

summary.en: Switzerland's Breel Embolo becomes first player to be sent off as a result of a new law for mistaken identity at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 瑞士的Breel Embolo成为第一个因世界杯错误身份而被罚下场的球员。

title.en: Did ball hit spidercam before England goal? Snicko says not - Norway unsure
title.zh-CN: 球是否在英格兰进球前击中了蜘蛛摄像头？ Snicko说不-挪威不确定

summary.en: Norway's World Cup campaign ends in a quarter-final defeat by England, but they leave frustrated, arguing that Jude Bellingham's equaliser should not have counted.
summary.zh-CN: 挪威的世界杯战役以英格兰四分之一决赛的失利告终，但他们感到沮丧，认为裘德·贝林汉姆的扳平比分不应该算在内。

title.en: Top four ranked teams make semi-finals for first time
title.zh-CN: 排名前四的球队首次进入半决赛

summary.en: For the first time since there have been Fifa rankings the top four ranked teams have made the semi-final of the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 自国际足联排名以来，排名前四的球队首次进入世界杯半决赛。

title.en: Alvarez scores extra-time stunner as Argentina set up blockbuster semi vs England
title.zh-CN: 阿尔瓦雷斯在阿根廷与英格兰的比赛中取得了加时赛得分

summary.en: Julian Alvarez scored an extra-time stunner as Argentina beat 10-man Switzerland 3-1 and set up a mouth-watering World Cup semi-final clash with England.
summary.zh-CN: 朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯（ Julian Alvarez ）获得了一名加时赛击球手，阿根廷以3比1击败10人瑞士队，并与英格兰队进行了一场令人垂涎的世界杯半决赛。

title.en: Julián Álvarez’s extra-time stunner sinks 10-man Switzerland to send Argentina into semi-finals
title.zh-CN: 朱利安·阿尔瓦雷斯（ Julián Álvarez ）的加时赛击败10人瑞士队，将阿根廷队送入半决赛

summary.en: Did anyone think they would do it the easy way? Argentina were labouring towards penalties with eight minutes of extra time left against a dogged, supremely organised 10-man Switzerland. There was a...
summary.zh-CN: 有没有人认为他们会以简单的方式做到这一点？阿根廷正在努力争取对一个顽强的，组织严密的10人瑞士队进行8分钟的额外时间。有一个……

title.en: World Cup 2026: reaction to England’s quarter-final win over Norway and more – live
title.zh-CN: 2026年世界杯：对英格兰四分之一决赛战胜挪威及其他国家的反应–现场直播

summary.en: ⚽ All the latest as the quarter-finals conclude⚽ Player guide | Bracketology| Golden Boot | Email usNorway were aggrieved that England’s opening goal was allowed to stand after the ball appeared to...
summary.zh-CN: 四分之一决赛结束时⚽的所有最新消息⚽球员指南| Bracketology | Golden Boot |给我们发电子邮件挪威感到愤慨的是，在球出现后，英格兰队的首场进球被允许站立......

title.en: Jude Bellingham excels in parallel World Cup but cannot win trophy alone | Barney Ronay
title.zh-CN: Jude Bellingham擅长平行世界杯，但不能独自赢得奖杯| Barney Ronay

summary.en: Up against Norway’s heart and skill and Florida’s heat, talisman got England through – but there is much to fixJude against the sun. For much of this game there was a feeling of three separate...
summary.zh-CN: 面对挪威的心脏和技巧以及佛罗里达的炎热，护身符让英格兰度过了难关–但还有很多事情要解决犹太人对抗太阳的问题。在这场比赛的大部分时间里，有三种不同的感觉……

title.en: England wobble but Djed Spence and John Stones make case for the defence
title.zh-CN: 英格兰队摇摆不定，但Djed Spence和John Stones为防守辩护

summary.en: Tuchel’s half-time changes and Pickford’s skittishness lifted Norway, but backline finally rose to occasionEngland were back in Azteca mode in the end. Big Dan Burn was on to thump those headers...
summary.zh-CN: 图切尔的半场变化和皮克福德的紧张情绪提升了挪威，但后卫终于崛起英格兰最终又回到了阿兹特克模式。大丹伯恩猛击那些头球……

title.en: 'Man of all the moments' - Bellingham gives England the lead
title.zh-CN: “所有时刻的人” -贝林厄姆让英格兰领先

summary.en: Jude Bellingham scores his second goal of the game to give England a 2-1 lead over Norway during extra time of their 2026 World Cup quarter-final in Miami.
summary.zh-CN: 裘德·贝林汉姆（ Jude Bellingham ）在比赛的第二个进球是在迈阿密举行的2026年世界杯四分之一决赛的额外时间里，英格兰队以2比1领先挪威队。

title.en: All the goals from England's 2026 World Cup campaign so far
title.zh-CN: 到目前为止，英格兰2026年世界杯的所有进球

summary.en: As England gear up to face Norway at the Miami Stadium for the World Cup quarter-finals, re-live all the goals that got Thomas Tuchel's side there.
summary.zh-CN: 随着英格兰队准备在迈阿密体育场迎战挪威队，参加世界杯四分之一决赛，重温托马斯·图切尔在那里的所有进球。

title.en: South Africa World Cup midfielder Adams dies aged 25
title.zh-CN: 南非世界杯中场亚当斯去世，享年25岁

summary.en: South Africa and Mamelodi Sundowns midfielder Jayden Adams dies at the age of 25, just weeks after featuring for his country at the World Cup.
summary.zh-CN: 南非和Mamelodi Sundowns中场球员杰登·亚当斯（ Jayden Adams ）在世界杯上代表他的国家出场几周后，于25岁时去世。

title.en: Fifa official refuses to answer BBC's Balogun ban questions
title.zh-CN: 国际足联官员拒绝回答英国广播公司的Balogun禁令问题

summary.en: The head of Fifa's disciplinary committee refuses to answer BBC questions about the decision-making process which led to United States striker Folarin Balogun avoiding a ban after being sent off.
summary.zh-CN: 国际足联纪律委员会主席拒绝回答英国广播公司关于导致美国前锋Folarin Balogun在被解雇后避免被禁赛的决策过程的问题。

title.en: Spain beat Germany to win U19 Euros in Wrexham
title.zh-CN: 西班牙在雷克瑟姆击败德国赢得U19欧元

summary.en: Spain claim the Uefa Men's Under-19 Championship for the 10th time with a 2-0 victory over Germany at Wrexham's Racecourse Ground.
summary.zh-CN: 西班牙第10次夺得欧足联19岁以下男子冠军，在雷克瑟姆赛马场以2比0战胜德国队。

summary.en: Will you get today's player in as few attempts as possible?

summary.en: Manchester United's pre-season schedule begins before the World Cup final, and with so many senior players still missing, which youngsters could impress?

title.en: How to take a World Cup shootout penalty

summary.en: We have a look at what can be learned from every World Cup penalty taken in a shootout ever.

summary.en: Former Liverpool manager to replace Julian NagelsmannGermany lost to Paraguay in last 32 of the World CupJürgen Klopp has “reached an agreement on the key points” to become the next Germany head...

title.en: 'Influential' Lamine Yamal has 'more to give' to Spain

summary.en: BBC Sport World Cup pundits Cesar Azpilicueta and Wayne Rooney look at how Lamine Yamal performed against Belgium and feel there is "more to come" from the Spain forward.

title.en: Merino the unlikely hero again - as Spain wait for Lamine Yamal show

summary.en: Mikel Merino came off the bench to send Spain into the World Cup semi-finals - but Lamine Yamal is still waiting for his moment to truly shine.

title.en: Lammens' error spells end for Belgium's golden generation

summary.en: Belgium's World Cup campaign ends after Senne Lammens' error against Spain - could it all be over for their golden generation too?

title.en: Edwards leaves football chief role with Liverpool owners FSG

summary.en: Liverpool owners Fenway Sports Group announce the departure of Michael Edwards, the company's chief executive of football.

title.en: 'A bit of a rebel' - what can Celtic expect from forward Duran?

summary.en: Celtic are set to sign their first player in the transfer window - 24-year-old Colombian forward Camilo Duran from Qarabag - for a reported £5.5m. But who is he?

title.en: England defender Charles joins Man City from Chelsea

summary.en: Manchester City have signed England international Niamh Charles for £500,000 from Women's Super League rivals Chelsea.

title.en: Arsenal sign Spain defender Batlle on free transfer

summary.en: Arsenal sign Spain international Ona Batlle on a free transfer following her exit from Barcelona.
